name: Veal Scallopini
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup tomatoes, skinned, seeded, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound veal to 1/8 inch thick.
2. Dredge in seasoned flour.
3. In a medium skillet, sauté veal in butter and olive oil combination.
4. Remove veal and place it in a casserole dish.
5. Add 2 tablespoons butter to the skillet.
6. Sauté mushrooms, onions, and garlic for 3 minutes.
7. Add the rest of the ingredients and blend well.
8. Cover and bake at 325°F for 45 minutes.
Description:
"enhanced by the fresh diced tomatoes"
Source:
"Dierbergs recipe cards"
